title: viola × jagellonica
intro: Viola × jagellonica, also known as the hybrid pansy or jagellonica viola, is a cross between the common pansy (Viola x wittrockiana) and the wild pansy (Viola tricolor). It is a hardy, perennial flowering plant used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Viola × jagellonica include reducing stress and anxiety, improving mood, and promoting relaxation, as well as possessing potential anti-cancer properties. Herbal preparations of Viola × jagellonica can be made into teas, infusions, tinctures, and capsules, and are often used to support immune function and overall well-being.
